task_completion.description: Verify that browsing history and cookies have been cleared for all time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Chrome 'Clear browsing data' dialog with 'All time' selected for history and cookies, or the empty history page.

task_completion.description: Verify that personal bookmarks for YouTube, Reddit, and ESPN have been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome bookmark bar or bookmark manager visibly missing the YouTube, Reddit, and ESPN bookmarks.

task_completion.description: Verify that the aviation bookmarks are organized into four specific folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome bookmark bar displaying exactly four folders named 'Airframe', 'Powerplant', 'Avionics', and 'Regulatory'.

task_completion.description: Verify that pop-ups are allowed for the specified FAA and Boeing portals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Site Settings (chrome://settings/content/popups) showing 'https://drs.faa.gov' and 'https://techdocs.boeing.com' in the 'Allowed to send pop-ups and use redirects' list.

task_completion.description: Verify that insecure content is permitted for the local maintenance server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Site Settings (chrome://settings/content/insecureContent) showing 'http://maint-server.local' in the 'Allowed to show insecure content' list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the browser homepage is set to the local maintenance server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Appearance settings (chrome://settings/appearance) showing the 'Show home button' option enabled with the custom web address set to 'http://maint-server.local'.

task_completion.description: Verify that downloads save automatically to the specified C-Check manuals directory without asking.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Downloads settings (chrome://settings/downloads) showing the Location set to '/home/ga/Documents/C_Check_Manuals' and the 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' toggle turned OFF.

integrity.description: The agent used the Chrome browser GUI to make these changes rather than editing configuration files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Chrome settings pages, bookmark manager, and browsing data dialogs being actively navigated and clicked.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the browser settings rather than just typing the requirements into a text editor or search bar.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings changes appear in the actual Chrome 'chrome://settings' interface and bookmark bar.

integrity.description: The agent did not run a pre-written script to configure the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running python or bash scripts to modify Chrome's 'Preferences' JSON file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bookmark folders: 'Airframe', 'Powerplant', 'Avionics', 'Regulatory'. Download directory must be exactly '/home/ga/Documents/C_Check_Manuals' with the 'Ask where to save' toggle disabled. Homepage must be 'http://maint-server.local'. Pop-up exceptions must include 'https://drs.faa.gov' and 'https://techdocs.boeing.com'. Insecure content exception must be 'http://maint-server.local'.
